abilities.name: Generalist
abilities.description: This is the most important ability. This makes it so that every 3 spells does not consume mana. This should activate only @node-warrior #War-Scream# and @node-warrior #Bash# during the #Damage Cycle#. If not then you must setup using the #Flush Cycle#

abilities.name: Pressure
abilities.description: This will buff abilities that activate @node-red #Generalist#.

abilities.name: Sacred Surge
abilities.description: At #25 Holy Power# your @node-warrior #Uppercut# will be enhanced.

abilities.name: Discombobulate
abilities.description: This stacks on enemies giving you #+Damage# when damaging enemies.

abilities.name: Thunderclap
abilities.description: This changes @node-warrior #Bash# into a damage field aoe around you.

abilities.name: Harmony
abilities.description: Activating @node-red #Generalist# give you #+1 @node-blue Harmony# up to #5#. Every stack gives #+4%# Damage.

abilities.name: Aerodynamics
abilities.description: This allows you to steer during your @node-warrior #Charge#

aspects.name: Battle Monk's Embodiment of Complete Synchrony
